evals.name: limited-beta-copy
evals.prompt: Write launch copy for 50 real seats without creating panic or fake deadlines.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.

evals.name: checkout-urgency-audit
evals.prompt: Audit this checkout page for fabricated scarcity and rewrite the urgency blocks.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.
